Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
155 
INSULIN_MO_COPAY_3M 
LABEL: 
Insulin Copay Standard Mail Order — Three-Month Supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a three-month supply of the insulin 
drugs on this tier, using a standard mail order pharmacy. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This variable is new in 2024. The
